allow: Bash(echo "=== PHASE 1 REFACTORING: Route Files Analysis ===" echo "" echo "Route files to refactor:" wc -l server/routes/*.ts)
Bash(for file in client-notes.ts team.ts jobs.ts invoices.ts parts.ts tasks.routes.ts)

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Refactor server routes with centralized error handling and validation

Phase 1 refactoring reduces route code by 640 lines \(-18.4%\) while improving security and maintainability:

- Add asyncHandler wrapper eliminating 50+ try/catch blocks
- Add validateSchema helper for centralized Zod validation
- Add ownershipGuards for last-owner protection logic
- Apply .strict\(\) to all Zod schemas preventing mass assignment
- Standardize error handling with createError utility
- Add 30 critical database indexes for performance

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(else echo "DATABASE_URL not found in environment")
Bash(echo "Checking for DATABASE_URL environment variable:"; env | grep -i database_url || echo "DATABASE_URL not found in environment")
